title: Listoni Plaza
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Listoni Plaza''' was an open-air plaza on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was sometimes used for diplomatic ceremonies.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
